return({mtw=function(V,x)for x,x in V.BK(V.jFD)do local x=V.Bz(x) V.BmN[V.kx]=x V.wsP[x]=V.kx V.kx=V.kx+0B1 end x=V:_ud(x) local r=V:DA() local b=V.ndC(x) local F=0B0 local t=0B10010011 local R=0B11100100 local L=0B110 local _=0B100000000000 local g=0B1000000000000 local O=0B10000000000000 local B=0B100000000000000 local H=0B1000000000000000 local P=0B1111100000000000 local j=0B101001101000111 local K=0B0 local c=0B1 local o=0B10 local v=0B11 local T=0B100 local M=0B101 local d=0B110 local h=0B111 local a local Q local E local function I(x)error(V.OK("\x66\x61\x69\x6C\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73",x),0B0)end local function x(x)if V.h(x,0B1)~=0B0 then return-(V._(x,0B1)+0B1)end return V._(x,0B1)end local function S()local x=V.Nn(b,F) F+=0B1 return V.N(x,r())end local y=V.wl(0B100) local X=V.wl(0B1000) local function W()local L=0B0 local x=0B0 while((2817180/59940)==((233998030/5831)-(80822+-40739)))do local P=S() L=V.rTO(L,V.Zj(V.h(P,a),x)) x+=E if V.h(P,Q)==0B0 then break end end return L end local function z()return x(W())end local function x()local x=W() if x==0B0 then return""end local P=V.wl(x) for x=0B0,x-0B1 do V.Qd_(P,x,V.N(V.Nn(b,F),r())) F+=0B1 end return V.I(P)end local function x()for x=0B0,0B111 do V.Qd_(X,x,V.N(V.Nn(b,F),r())) F+=0B1 end return V.Oxz(X,0B0)end local function l()for x=0B0,0B11 do V.Qd_(y,x,V.N(V.Nn(b,F),r())) F+=0B1 end return V.xW(y,0B0)end local function X(x,P)local x=V.h((x*0B1111010001)+(P*0B10000011)+0B10011110001101110111100110111001,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) return V.q(x,P%0B11111)end local function y(x,P)local x=V.N(x,V._(x,0B1011)) return V.h(V.N(x,(P*0B10001)+0B10100101),0B11111111)end local function b(h,B,P,L,x)return V.h((h*0B1011)+(B*0B10001)+P+V._(L,0B1011)+(x*0B11),0B11111111)end local function r(L,v,x)local L=X(L,v) local M=V.N(x,L) local o=V.sv(M,0B10000,0B1000) local x=y(L,v) if o~=x then I("\x6D\x65\x74\x61\x5F\x6B\x65\x79")end local x=V.h(M,0B11111111) local B=V.sv(M,0B1000,0B11) local L=V.h(M,P) local h=V.N(x,o) local x=V.sv(M,0B11000,0B1000) local P=b(h,B,o,L,v) if x~=P then I("\x6D\x65\x74\x61\x5F\x74\x61\x67")end return h,B,L end local function y()local P=S() if P==K then return nil elseif P==c then return((45154-45153)==(31866-31684))elseif P==o then return((49077-48940)==(7557-7420))elseif P==v then return x()elseif P==T then local L=W() local x=S() local P=V.TI(L) for x=0B1,L do P[x]=S()end return{[0B0]=j,x,L,P}elseif P==M then local x=W() local P=V.TI(x) for x=0B1,x do P[x]=z()end return P elseif P==d then local h,P,x,L=l(),l(),l(),l() return{x=h,y=P,z=x,w=L}elseif P==h then return z()end I("\x76\x61\x6C\x75\x65\x5F\x74\x61\x67")end local P=S() local x=S() if P~=t or x~=R then I("\x6D\x69\x73\x6D\x61\x74\x63\x68\x5F\x31")end local x=S() if x~=L then I("\x6D\x69\x73\x6D\x61\x74\x63\x68\x5F\x32")end local x=S() if x<0B1 or x>0B111 then I("\x69\x6E\x76\x61\x6C\x69\x64\x5F\x31")end a=V.Zj(0B1,x)-0B1 Q=V.h(V.vOe(a),0B11111111) E=x local x=W() local L=V.TI(x) for x=0B1,x do local t={["\x73\x77"]=V.TI(0B0),["\x54"]=0B0,["\x72"]=nil} t.g=W() t["\x78\x69"]=W() t["\x66"]=V.TI(t["\x78\x69"]) t["\x59"]=V.TI(t["\x78\x69"]) for L=0B1,t["\x78\x69"]do local P=W() local x,h,o=r(t.g,L,P) local v={m=P} local P=nil local M=0B1 if h==0B1 then v.x=W()elseif h==0B10 then v.x=W() v.y=W()elseif h==0B11 then v.x=W() v.y=W() v.z=W()elseif h==0B100 then v.x=W() v.y=W()elseif h==0B101 then v.x=W()end if V.h(o,V.rTO(V.rTO(_,g),V.rTO(O,H)))~=0B0 then P={}end if V.h(o,_)~=0B0 then P[M]=z() M=M+0B1 end if V.h(o,g)~=0B0 then P[M]=y() M=M+0B1 end if V.h(o,O)~=0B0 then local x=W() P[M]=x M=M+0B1 for x=0B1,x do P[M]=y() M=M+0B1 end end if V.h(o,H)~=0B0 then P[M]=S()==0B1 end if P~=nil then v.p=P end if V.h(o,B)~=0B0 then local x=W() local P=V.TI(x) for x=0B1,x do P[x]={["\x56"]=S(),["\x58"]=W()}end v.c=P end t["\x66"][L]=v t["\x59"][L]=x end t["\x52"]=W() t["\x51"]=V.TI(t["\x52"]) for x=0B1,t["\x52"]do t["\x51"][x]=W()+0B1 end t["\x57\x72"]=W() P=0B0 for x=0B1,t["\x78\x69"]do P+=W() t["\x72"][x]=P end else t["\x72"]=nil end L[x]=t end local x=W() local P=L[x+0B1] if P==nil then x[0B1001101]={0B100,0B101010110000010000011110,0B1001100001000110111001,0B11111010000000,0B10001101} x[0B1001111]={0B1,0B10100110000000100000110,0B10001010000001110000010,0B111101110100001,0B10110} x[0B1010000]={0B11,0B110000000000100101101,0B110100100001100111001101,0B10011010101011,0B11001010} x[0B1010001]={0B10,0B10011010000010000100100,0B10010000001001011111001,0B11110101111000,0B101} x[0B1010011]={0B11,0B10111110000000100111010,0B111010010010000000111000,0B101011010100001,0B10110110} R[0B100]=x local b=NP.TI(0B110) b[0B1]=0B101111 b[0B10]=0B1101011 b[0B11]=0B111010 b[0B100]=0B10111110 b[0B101]=0B11111100 b[0B110]=0B10111000 local T=0B100000000000 local d=0B1000000000000 local t=0B10000000000000 local j=0B100000000000000 local v=0B1000000000000000 local M=0B1111100000000000 local x=0B101001101000111 local function K(o)if type(o)=="\x74\x61\x62\x6C\x65"and o[0B0]==x then local B=o[0B1] if type(B)=="\x73\x74\x72\x69\x6E\x67"then return B end local h=B or 0B0 local x=o[0B10]or 0B0 local P=o[0B11]or{} local L=NP.wl(x) for B=0B1,x do local x=NP.q(h,(B-0B1)%0B1000) local x=NP.h(h+(B*0B11101)+x+NP.h(B*0B1011,0B11111111),0B11111111) NP.Qd_(L,B-0B1,NP.N(P[B],x))end B=NP.I(L) o[0B1]=B o[0B10]=nil o[0B11]=nil return B end return o end local function h(x,P)local x=NP.h((x*0B1111010001)+(P*0B10000011)+0B10011110001101110111100110111001,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) return NP.q(x,P%0B11111)end local function L(x,P)local x=NP.N(x,NP._(x,0B1011)) return NP.h(NP.N(x,(P*0B10001)+0B10100101),0B11111111)end local function B(P,h,B,x,L)return NP.h((P*0B1011)+(h*0B10001)+B+NP._(x,0B1011)+(L*0B11),0B11111111)end local function c(L,P,x)local P=NP.h(NP.q(L,P*0B101),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) local x=NP.N(x or 0B0,P) if NP.h(x,0B1)~=0B0 then return-(NP._(x,0B1)+0B1)end return NP._(x,0B1)end local function o(x,j,P)local v=h(x,j) local t=NP.N(P,v) local P=NP.sv(t,0B10000,0B1000) local x=L(v,j) if P~=x then error(NP.OK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x20\x6D\x65\x74\x61\x3A\x20\x25\x73",tostring(j)),0B0)end local x=NP.h(t,0B11111111) local h=NP.sv(t,0B1000,0B11) local o=NP.h(t,M) local L=NP.N(x,P) local x=NP.sv(t,0B11000,0B1000) local P=B(L,h,P,o,j) if x~=P then error(NP.OK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x20\x6D\x65\x74\x61\x3A\x20\x25\x73",tostring(j)),0B0)end return L,h,o,v end local function x(P,B,x)local x,P,L,h=o(P.g or 0B0,x,B.m or 0B0) local o={["\x5A"]=x} if P==0B1 then o["\x56"]=c(h,0B1,B.x)elseif P==0B10 then o["\x56"]=c(h,0B1,B.x) o["\x58"]=c(h,0B10,B.y)elseif P==0B11 then o["\x56"]=c(h,0B1,B.x) o["\x58"]=c(h,0B10,B.y) o["\x76\x47"]=c(h,0B11,B.z)elseif P==0B100 then o["\x56"]=c(h,0B1,B.x) o["\x4D\x65"]=c(h,0B10,B.y)elseif P==0B101 then o["\x6D"]=c(h,0B1,B.x)end local h=B.p local P=0B1 if NP.h(L,T)~=0B0 then o["\x64\x68"]=(h and h[P])or 0B0 P+=0B1 end if NP.h(L,d)~=0B0 then o["\x54\x45"]=K(h and h[P]) P+=0B1 end if NP.h(L,t)~=0B0 then local x=(h and h[P])or 0B0 o["\x4D"]=x P+=0B1 if x>=0B1 then o["\x41\x46"]=K(h and h[P]) P+=0B1 end if x>=0B10 then o["\x65\x65"]=K(h and h[P]) P+=0B1 end if x>=0B11 then o["\x59\x67"]=K(h and h[P]) P+=0B1 end end if NP.h(L,v)~=0B0 then o["\x65\x52"]=(h and h[P])or(((89351-89334)*(30157+-30152))==(27622-27610))end if NP.h(L,j)~=0B0 then o["\x57"]=B.c or{}end return o end local function j(t,d,T)local yS=NP.TI(d["\x78\x69"]) local XS=NP.TI(d["\x78\x69"]) local h=NP.TI(d["\x78\x69"]) local P=NP.h((d["\x78\x69"]*0B11101101)+d["\x55"]+d["\x42\x50"]+0B11110,0B1111111111111111111111111111111) for x=0B1,d["\x78\x69"]do h[x]=x end for L=d["\x78\x69"],0B10,-0B1 do P=NP.h((P*0B1000001110001100100111001101101)+0B11000000111001+L+d["\x57\x72"],0B1111111111111111111111111111111) local x=(P%L)+0B1 h[L],h[x]=h[x],h[L]end for v=0B1,d["\x78\x69"]do local h=h[v] yS[v]=h local P=d["\x66"][v] local x=x(d,P,v) local B=x["\x5A"]+0B1 local o=E[B] local L=Q[B] local M=NP.h((h*0B1111010001)+(v*0B100000001)+(o*0B10001)+L+0B11110,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) local v=NP.h(NP.N(M,d["\x57\x72"]+B+o),0B11111111) local P=NP.TI(0B100) for x=0B1,0B100 do local t=R[x][B] if t~=nil then local o=NP.h(t[0B100]+M+x*0B10000011+L*0B10001+o*0B11101,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) local L=t[0B1] local B,h if L==0B1 then local x=NP.h(NP.N(M,o)+v,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) B=NP.N(t[0B10],x) h=NP.N(t[0B11],NP.q(x,0B101))elseif L==0B10 then local x=NP.h(o+NP.q(M,0B11)+v,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) B=NP.h(t[0B10]+x,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) h=NP.N(t[0B11],NP.xq(x,0B111))elseif L==0B11 then local x=NP.h(NP.N(NP.xq(M,0B111),o)+NP.Zj(v,0B1000),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) B=NP.N(t[0B10],NP.xq(x,0B11)) h=NP.N(t[0B11],NP.h(x*0B11,0B11111111111111111111111111111111))elseif L==0B101 then local x=NP.h(NP.N(o+v,NP.q(M,0B1011)),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) B=NP.h(t[0B10]-x,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) h=NP.N(t[0B11],NP.q(x,0B1101))else local x=NP.h(o+NP.xq(M,0B1101)+NP.Zj(v,0B101),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) B=NP.N(t[0B10],x) h=NP.N(t[0B11],NP.h((x*0B101)+0B10011110001101110111100110111001,0B11111111111111111111111111111111))end P[x]={NP.N(b[L],NP.h(o+v+NP.h(M,0B11111111),0B11111111)),B,h,o,t[0B101]}end end XS[h]={x,P,M,v,NP.N(M,(o*0B100000001)+L+0B11110)}end h=nil local function P(...)local h,p,B,M,x=... local R,ES=-0B1,0B1 local b=setmetatable({},{__mode="\x76\x73"}) local d=setmetatable({},{__mode="\x6B\x73"}) local TS=((8592735/55437)==(8209676/72652)) local gS,RS local dS,bS,KS,QS local cS=0B100 local LS=function()do local x=p local P=gS local h=NP.h(((0B1010001+0B110111100001111)*0B1111111)+0B111100011+0B101,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) local B=0B11000110 local L=0B11001110 break else B=0B11001110 end end end end local PS=function()do local L=NP.h(((0B111110+0B100111101011001)*0B1101111)+0B111101001+0B1001,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) local h=0B1111111 local else o=h end elseif o==0B1001110 then do do local x=x local L=L[x["\x58"]+0B1] L.store[L.index]=P[x["\x56"]]end end B=NP.h(B+0B1000001110+NP.q(B,0B101),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) o=0B100010 elseif B==0B101110 then break else B=0B101110 end end end end local p=function()do local L=gS local x=p local B=0B101001 elseif B==0B101001 then break else B=0B101001 end end end end local function rS(h)h=h*0B1110+0B10100100010 if 0B11000010000>h then if 0B10110111100>h then if 0B10101101000>h then if 0B10100111110>h then if 0B10100110000>h then return nil elseif h>0B10100110000 then if h~=0B10100110000 then return nil end else return LS end elseif h>0B10100111110 then if h~=0B10100111110 then if 0B10101001100>h then return nil elseif h>0B10101001100 then if h~=0B10101001100 then if 0B10101011010>h then return nil elseif h>0B10101011010 then if h~=0B10101011010 then return nil end else return m end end else return xS end end else return PS end elseif h>0B10101101000 then if h~=0B10101101000 then if 0B10110100000>h then if 0B10110000100>h then if 0B10101110110>h then return nil elseif h>0B10101110110 then if h~=0B10101110110 then return nil end else return hS end elseif h>0B10110000100 then if h~=0B10110000100 then if 0B10110010010>h then return nil elseif h>0B10110010010 then if h~=0B10110010010 then return nil end else return oS end end else return BS end elseif h>0B10110100000 then if h~=0B10110100000 then if 0B10110101110>h then return nil elseif h>0B10110101110 then if h~=0B10110101110 then return nil end else return vS end end else return MS end end else return tS end elseif h>0B10110111100 then if h~=0B10110111100 then if 0B10111100110>h then if 0B10111001010>h then return nil elseif h>0B10111001010 then if h~=0B10111001010 then if 0B10111011000>h then return nil elseif h>0B10111011000 then if h~=0B10111011000 then return nil end else return i end end else return jS end elseif h>0B10111100110 then if h~=0B10111100110 then if 0B10111110100>h then return nil elseif h>0B10111110100 then if h~=0B10111110100 then if 0B11000000010>h then return nil elseif h>0B11000000010 then if h~=0B11000000010 then return nil end else return G end end else return L end end else return v end end else return P end elseif h>0B11000010000 then if h~=0B11000010000 then if 0B11101111100>h then if 0B11010011100>h then if 0B11001010110>h then if 0B11000101100>h then if 0B11000011110>h then return nil elseif h>0B11000011110 then if h~=0B11000011110 then return nil end else return f end elseif h>0B11000101100 then if h~=0B11000101100 then if 0B11000111010>h then return nil elseif h>0B11000111010 then if h~=0B11000111010 then if 0B11001001000>h then return nil elseif h>0B11001001000 then if h~=0B11001001000 then return nil end else return u end end else return n end end else return J end elseif h>0B11001010110 then if h~=0B11001010110 then if 0B11001110010>h then if 0B11001100100>h then return nil elseif h>0B11001100100 then if h~=0B11001100100 then return nil end else return e end elseif h>0B11001110010 then if h~=0B11001110010 then if 0B11010000000>h then Z end end else return s end end else return A end elseif h>0B11010011100 then if h~=0B11010011100 then if 0B11011111110>h then if 0B11011000110>h then if 0B11010101010>h then return nil elseif h>0B11010101010 then if h~=0B11010101010 then if 0B11010111000>h then return nil elseif h>0B11010111000 then if h~=0B11010111000 then return nil end else return _ end end else return o end elseif
